zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Vernon於1433年出生在英國德比夏爾哈登 霍爾時，她的父親Richard Vernon18歲，母親Elizabeth Pembridge18歲。她於1446年7月與Lord John Bradburne在英國德比夏爾萊藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1469年在英國英格蘭享年36歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾。

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Vernon was born in 1433, in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, her father, Richard Vernon, was 18 and her mother, Elizabeth Pembridge, was 18. She married Lord John Bradburne in July 1446, in Hulland, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. She died in 1469, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36, and was buried in Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Vernon est née en 1433, à Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Vernon, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Pembridge, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Lord John Bradburne en juillet 1446, à Hulland, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1469, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.Over Haddon, Bakewell, Derbyshire, Engla: Over Haddon, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Vernon 1433 in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Vernon 18 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Pembridge 18. Sie hat im Juli 1446 in Hulland, Derbyshire, England Lord John Bradburne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1469 im Alter von 36 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Vernon è nata il nel 1433 nel Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Richard Vernon, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Pembridge, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Lord John Bradburne nel luglio 1446, nel Hulland, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1469, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolta a Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Vernonが1433年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアハッドオン ハルで生まれた時，父Richard Vernonは18歳，母Elizabeth Pembridgeは18歳であった。1446年7月にイギリスデルブイシュアイアハランドでLord John Bradburneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1469年にイギリスイギリスで36歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Vernon(이)가 1433년 영국 더비실르 하던 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Vernon(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Pembridge(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1446년 7월 영국 더비실르 훌랜드에서 Lord John Bradburne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1469년 영국 잉글랜드에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르에 묻혔다.

pt.Over Haddon, Bakewell, Derbyshire, Engla: Over Haddon, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Vernon nasceu em 1433, em Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Vernon, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Pembridge, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord John Bradburne em julho de 1446, em Hulland, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1469, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Vernon родилась в 1433 г. в местности хаддон холл, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Vernon было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Pembridge, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord John Bradburne июль 1446 г. в местности хулланд, дирбишир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1469 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Vernon nació en 1433, en Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Vernon, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Pembridge, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Lord John Bradburne en julio de 1446, en Hulland, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió en 1469, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultada en Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
